title: Supreme Court Docket US-SCOTUS-0486
summary: 1 The question we have here is whether respondent William I. Connelly, hereafter referred to as the taxpayer, is entitled to the $1,500 exclusion from gross income provided by § 22(b)(13)(A) of the Internal Revenue Code.1 The taxpayer claimed this additional allowance for the taxable years 1943 a...
